text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Students at Tracen often compete with each other in scrimmage races
as part of their training regimens. Silence Suzuka is taking part in one
such race today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still concerned after seeing how troubled she appeared in the library
the other day, I decide to come out to observe her.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, I take it that you understand the objective of this scrimmage,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... To practice the techniques I'll be using in my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: That's correct. Your debut is coming up next month.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
We've been focusing on having you better conserve your speed and
energy. It's time to put everything to practice in a proper race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking forward to this day, Suzuka. Show me how far
you've come under your trainer's guidance.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I won't be giving up the lead.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I couldn't have said it better myself, so right back at you. I'm
heading for the gates now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All I have to do is remember what she taught me—conserve energy at
the start and save it for the final leg...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Right... I've got this. This is the way it's supposed to be done. I'll win
for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gates spring open on Silence Suzuka's latest scrimmage race.
However...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Not yet... I still need to conserve my energy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To anyone who witnessed her tremendous lead during her tryout race,
today's Silence Suzuka appears to be an entirely different runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No doubt she is trying to implement new speed conservation
techniques introduced by her new trainer. But it's hard to say if
they're effective...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pant... Gasp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She finds herself surrounded by her rivals; distress and frustration are
uncharacteristicallyscrawled across her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She staggers into the race's final leg...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This is the homestretch... Now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: W-wait... My legs... don't have the energy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This ends here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if set off by Air Groove's own final push, the other runners begin to
overtake Silence Suzuka one after another, leaving her buried at the
back of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I can't see anything...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My view... is gone...

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Eighth place... A regrettable finish indeed.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You stuck to the plan and performed brilliantly in the first half of the
race, but you weren't able to break away in the second half. Why is
that?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Suzuka? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... I-I'm sorry... Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm honestly... not sure. I don't... I don't know what happened...

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...I see. These things can take some time, so it's safe to say you might
not be used to this strategy yet.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why don't we push back your debut race? This is not the
time to be reckless.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eh?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That means canceling my race... A-are you telling me not to run?!

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Please calm down. All I'm saying is that we should wait for a better
time. You can race once you've gotten more used to—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wait, please! I can run now! I mean, I want to run now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I need to be in the lead—

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
But you've yet to master your current running style. Even you can see
that, can you not?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka please listen to me. I'm just trying to help ensure that you are
in top form for your debut race.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Let's take some time to get you accustomed to the correct technique.
You will be racing and winning plenty after that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: How much time... is "some time"?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Pardon? I didn't catch that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. It's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm... going home now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A dejected Suzuka totters off the track with the faltering steps of a
lost child.
